title: centaurea margaritacea subsp. dubjanskyi
intro: Centaurea margaritacea subsp. dubjanskyi, also known as the Mongolian knapweed or White knapweed, is a plant species in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been found to have medicinal properties in treating various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestive health, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Centaurea margaritacea subsp. dubjanskyi often include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
